hooks.notes: Control of South Third now directly affects Rowan’s leverage against Pike; Review and district escalation increase procedural danger without resolving debt/license vulnerability.
Smooth old masonry is visibly confirmed under the street; movement below and alternate-access logic push the buried structure closer to the Bell Vault mystery without full reveal.
Hadrik arrives demanding what Rowan omitted; Maelin explicitly warns concealment will worsen Rowan’s hearing record.

hooks.type: institutional suppression / who controls the story
hooks.notes: Maelin blocks backfill, breach widening, and contractor descent, but Review arrives immediately; control fight becomes district vs Pike vs Review.
Movement below, interrupted airflow, and badly reset markers all raise live-survivor or recent-human-presence possibility, but no confirmation yet.

hooks.type: Rowan family connection / older hidden structure
hooks.notes: Rowan continues withholding route-linked knowledge and infers service-logic closure plus a real alternate path, deepening the hidden-history thread.

hooks.type: determine what disturbed the South Third search markers
hooks.notes: Rowan identifies the markers as badly reset rather than properly replaced, implying different or impaired hands using them as signal/manipulation.
Mara confronts Rowan over partial lies and reasserts her distinct stake; emotional accountability sharpens rather than resolves.

hooks.type: disturbed markers from inside South Third
hooks.notes: Official seal now preserves the site; marker disturbance likely connects to movement below and possible alternate access.

hooks.type: Nessa’s records race / restricted archive truth
hooks.notes: Bell-foundation archive relevance is repeated to district authority and enters restricted addendum, but wider circulation is still contested and vulnerable.
Pell backs Rowan’s no-contractor position, remains first-report channel, and privately buys him hours while demanding honesty.
Rowan now hears irregular cautious movement and the chapter ends with another faint answering scratch from below.
Maelin validates enough danger to seal the lane and route information through Pell, but she suspects Rowan knows more and threatens his hearing record if he freelances.

hooks.type: possible alternate entrance to the sealed structure
hooks.notes: Rowan puts the possibility of another access route on the table while denying specific knowledge; Pike and Review will now hunt for it.
